name: restruct/docsys-tools
description: Umbrella package: portable DocSys CLI tool wrappers + system tool paths (GS, convert, soffice)

suggest.restruct/cpdf-static: Coherent PDF wrappers (CPDF_PATH) — AGPL/commercially licensed, distributed via private repository only
suggest.restruct/wkhtmltopdf-static: wkhtmltopdf 0.12.6 patched-Qt wrappers (WKHTMLTOPDF_PATH) — public GitHub repo, add as vcs repository
